basic_details.job_title: Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Thane Municipal Corporation. A total of 06 vacancies have been announced through the Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation: 5 years for reserved categories (up to 43 years)

qualification.details: D.Pharm / B.Pharm from government or private sector with clinical experience and Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.thanecity.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Overview
Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Thane Municipal Corporation Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: D.Pharm / B.Pharm from government or private sector with clinical experience and Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration preferred.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age relaxation: 5 years for reserved categories (up to 43 years)

content_sections.heading: Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.thanecity.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist recruitment is 09 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a D.Pharm or B.Pharm degree. Clinical experience and registration with the Maharashtra Pharmacy Council are preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Pharmacist position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Pharmacist post is between 18 years and 38 years. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Pharmacist position in the Thane Municipal Corporation recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Thane Municipal Corporation Pharmacist recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 750 for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 500 for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Pharmacist post will receive a salary of Rs. 17,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the creation of a Merit List followed by Document Verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with the Thane Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Pharmacist post?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Thane Municipal Corporation, www.thanecity.gov.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section.
